promptDef.name: angular.dependency-injection.constructor-params

buildResult.message:
> app@0.0.0 build
> ng build

❯ Building...
✔ Building...
Application bundle generation failed. [1.848 seconds]


✘ [ERROR] TS2459: Module '"./product.service"' declares 'inject' locally, but it is not exported. [plugin angular-compiler]

    src/app/app.ts:3:25:
      3 │ import { ProductService, inject } from "./product.service";
        ╵                          ~~~~~~

  'inject' is declared here.

    src/app/product.service.ts:1:21:
      1 │ import { HttpClient, inject } from "@angular/common/http";
        ╵                      ~~~~~~


✘ [ERROR] TS7006: Parameter 'data' implicitly has an 'any' type. [plugin angular-compiler]

    src/app/app.ts:17:48:
      17 │     this.productService.getProduct().subscribe((data) => {
         ╵                                                 ~~~~


✘ [ERROR] TS2305: Module '"@angular/common/http"' has no exported member 'inject'. [plugin angular-compiler]

    src/app/product.service.ts:1:21:
      1 │ import { HttpClient, inject } from "@angular/common/http";
        ╵                      ~~~~~~

assessments.name: Dependency Injection
assessments.description: Use the inject() function for dependency injection in components, directives, pipes, and injectable services. Do not use constructor parameters for injection.
